title: Automation for Multiple Connect Boards
excerpt:
Appreciate that Monday.com comes out with the idea of a mirror column and has some automation for it.

posts.author: meiching1109 (Mei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Appreciate that Monday.com comes out with the idea of a mirror column and has some automation for it.

When I have connected to multiple boards, and try to create automation of “When Mirror Status changes to Done, change Main Status to Done” to trigger the move group automation. However, Monday.com does not support this automation.

Multiple connect boards mirror column does not allow automation1441×537 37.1 KB

Any way I can get a solution for this matter?

posts.author: Cherryl_JetPack (Cherryl @ Jetpack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @meiching1109
Welcome to the community! We’re glad to have you here.

You can easily achieve this using VLOOKUP app.
VLOOKUP is an alternative to monday connect boards /mirror column that support monday automations.

Screenshot 2023-03-08 at 9.21.54 PM1557×578 23.2 KB

In case you need any assistance with VLOOKUP, please feel free to reach out to our dedicated support team at appsupport@jetpackapps.co. Our team is always happy to help you with any queries or concerns you may have.

Hope this helps!
Cherryl

posts.author: meiching1109 (Mei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Cherryl,

Thank you for your reply. Can I understand how it works? I try VLOOKUP but it seems not available to do that: -

image1119×714 43.1 KB

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to set automations based on a mirror column that is connected to multiple boards. It would eliminate a lot of hand sorting for me, as well as help with tracking my sales activities better.

posts.author: vrvora (Viral Vora)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, This is such a time saver when your status needs to be updated based on multiple board’s status. I have to connect atleast 30 applications boards to update their status for a release and not having this functionality impairs my productivity.
